title: Resolve, to Study Methods of Gradually Transitioning Individuals from Government Assistance Programs to the Workforce
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, May 13, 2025
last_house_action: 3/28/2025 - Received by the Clerk of the House on March 28, 2025. The Resolve was REFERRED to the Committee on HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 401.
last_senate_action: 5/13/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
